ThingDef.label: hi-Tech drill platform
ThingDef.description: An automated deep-crust drilling rig for extracting minerals from deep under the surface. Capable of extracting stone chunks, but also any metal it finds.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech smelter
ThingDef.description: Extracts usable metal from slag chunks, broken-down weapons, apparel, stone chunks, and mechanoid corpses using strong electromagnets and heat.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech biofuel refinery
ThingDef.description: Automatically refines biological matter like wood or plant matter into chemfuel.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech masonry saw
ThingDef.description: An industrial machine capable of cutting stone chunks into usable blocks.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech mincer
ThingDef.description: A series of automated saws and mincers capable of processing corpses into processed mince.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech conveyor oven
ThingDef.description: An industrial oven for the automated mass-production of simple, shelf-stable, and packaged meals.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech assembler
ThingDef.description: An automated industrial machine for assembling complex items like components and advanced components.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech neutroamine synthesizer
ThingDef.description: An advanced chemical facility designed for the automated synthesis of neutroamine from organic feedstocks. It operates by converting rendered animal fat and chemfuel into neutroamine.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech ammunition press
ThingDef.description: An industrial-grade press capable of automatically manufacturing various artillery shells from raw materials.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech autoloom
ThingDef.description: An industrial-grade loom designed for the automatic production of textiles and apparel, it efficiently weaves materials like cloth and leather into various finished goods. It can only output goods of normal quality.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech alloy forge
ThingDef.description: A colossal industrial furnace built to contain the immense heat and pressure needed to bond base materials into exotic alloys like plasteel.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech distillery
ThingDef.description: An automated industrial distilling system for the mass production of beer and spirits from raw crops, requiring no manual labor.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech medicine granulator
ThingDef.description: An advanced pharmaceutical processor for the mass-production of basic medical supplies and drug batches from raw materials. It efficiently grinds, synthesizes, and packages items like medicine, psychite drugs, and smokeleaf joints.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech machining bay
ThingDef.description: An automated industrial facility designed for the precision manufacturing of various weapons, armor, and complex equipment. It can only output goods of normal quality.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.

ThingDef.label: hi-Tech conveyor crematorium
ThingDef.description: An industrial-grade furnace designed for the automated destruction of unwanted items, especially corpses and tainted apparel, using extreme heat.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.
